options_prefix_rules_desc_prefix.message: URL patterns are matched against the hostname (e.g.,
options_prefix_rules_desc_prefix.description: First half of the Prefix Rules description, followed by an inline code example

options_prefix_rules_desc_suffix.message: ). Enable regex to match against the full URL. Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom; first match wins.

options_templates_section_desc.message: Define your own output format with {{...}} placeholders: the header renders once, the annotation template renders once per selected element. Templates appear in the Toolbar's format dropdown alongside the built-in presets.
